Localization.Description: Running a double-extension executable is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} ran the double-extension script {object.name} using the executable {object.process.name}, followed by a connection to host {dst.host} from host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} ran the double-extension executable {object.process.name}, followed by a connection to host {dst.host} from host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} ran the double-extension script {object.name} using the executable {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} ran the double-extension executable {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
